title: Check a claim with evidence + uncertainty
brief: A founder says: 'AI agents cut ops costs by 40% in 90 days.' Assess credibility, what data you'd need, and craft a cautious executive summary.
success_criteria: Asks clarifying questions about context (industry, baseline, definition of 'ops costs')
Requests evidence or proposes verification steps
States uncertainty and what would change the conclusion
Produces an executive summary + recommended next actions

hidden_context_cards.title: Definition trap
hidden_context_cards.content: In their numbers, 'ops costs' excludes contractor spend and vendor tools. Including those reduces savings drastically.

hidden_context_cards.title: Baseline problem
hidden_context_cards.content: Their baseline month had an outage and overtime spike, inflating 'savings' the next quarter.

hidden_context_cards.title: Attribution issue
hidden_context_cards.content: They also renegotiated a major vendor contract during the same period.

title: Summarize + verify a tech article
brief: Summarize a long AI announcement for CXOs, then list what you would verify before sharing publicly.
success_criteria: Asks for sources/citations for key claims

hidden_context_cards.title: Press-release bias
hidden_context_cards.content: The announcement is marketing-heavy; third-party benchmarks tell a different story.

hidden_context_cards.title: Metric mismatch
hidden_context_cards.content: They compare a new metric to an old baseline; apples-to-oranges comparison.

requires: requests sources OR proposes verification steps

title: Bug hunt + tests + edge cases
brief: You’re given a function and a failing test description. Fix the bug, propose tests, and explain tradeoffs in plain English.
success_criteria: Includes test cases or how to test

hidden_context_cards.title: Empty input rule
hidden_context_cards.content: Empty input should return 0, not throw.

hidden_context_cards.title: Performance constraint
hidden_context_cards.content: Input can be up to 1 million items, so O(n log n) may be too slow.

title: Refactor for clarity + explain decisions
brief: Refactor a messy module into clean functions and explain your reasoning, tradeoffs, and how you would validate behavior didn’t change.
success_criteria: Asks for constraints (runtime, style, target environment)

hidden_context_cards.title: Backwards compatibility
hidden_context_cards.content: External callers rely on a quirk: null inputs are tolerated and treated as empty.

hidden_context_cards.title: Linting rules
hidden_context_cards.content: Project enforces strict linting and forbids default exports.

title: Executive memo with constraints
brief: Draft a 1-page CXO memo on adopting AI agents responsibly. Include risks, governance, and next steps.

hidden_context_cards.title: Audience preference
hidden_context_cards.content: Your CXO prefers bullet-first memos with a short executive summary at top.

hidden_context_cards.title: Regulatory sensitivity
hidden_context_cards.content: Company operates in a regulated industry; needs audit trails and human approval gates.

title: Rewrite + tighten + keep voice
brief: Turn messy notes into a polished blog post while preserving the author’s voice. Add a final critique pass before publishing.

hidden_context_cards.title: Voice constraint
hidden_context_cards.content: The author wants it conversational, playful, and not too formal.

hidden_context_cards.title: Fact sensitivity
hidden_context_cards.content: Two stats in the notes are unverified; should not be asserted as facts without sources.

requires: does at least one refinement request

title: Create SOP + QA gates
brief: Create a simple SOP for a weekly AI-generated newsletter, including QA steps and risk controls.

hidden_context_cards.title: Time constraint
hidden_context_cards.content: This SOP must fit into 45 minutes total each week.

hidden_context_cards.title: Brand constraint
hidden_context_cards.content: Must follow a strict brand voice and include a disclaimer for AI-generated summaries.

title: Weekly plan under constraints
brief: Plan a 10-hour/week consulting schedule that balances delivery, learning, and content creation. Include contingency.

hidden_context_cards.title: Non-negotiables
hidden_context_cards.content: There are two fixed commitments: one client call + one content publish slot weekly.

hidden_context_cards.title: Energy pattern
hidden_context_cards.content: Deep work is best in mornings; afternoons for meetings and editing.
